untranslatable_reason: Signal requires time-based conditions (calendar days: Jan 1-10, convention period days 83-161, election period days 195-253, and election year detection) and 2-year lookback price comparison. Available indicators do not include: (1) calendar/election year detection, (2) 2-year historical high price reference, (3) business day-of-year tracking. The '8% of 2-year high' requires a dc_upper or similar over 252-day period, which is not in the allowed indicator list. Time-gated entry windows require external date logic outside the indicator framework.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a time and calendar-based strategy that cannot be fully expressed using only price and technical indicators. It requires: (1) election year identification, (2) 2-year high reference (not available as dc_upper_252), (3) precise business day-of-year windows. The partial JSON above shows a placeholder entry condition but is incomplete and should be flagged for manual implementation or custom indicator development.
